description: Maps Salesforce object.field combinations to their required update strategies. Use this to avoid FLS errors and API limitations during bulk operations.

direct-update.description: Standard sf data update record command works
direct-update.notes: Use for most fields without restrictions

delete-recreate.description: Field has FLS restrictions preventing direct update - requires delete and recreate
steps: 1. Query and backup original record with all fields
3. Create new record with updated field value and all original fields
4. Update all relationship references to new record ID
delete-recreate.notes: Use for relationship fields with ContactId FLS restrictions

apex-required.description: Field update requires Apex code execution (e.g., calculated fields, triggers required)
apex-required.notes: Deploy Apex class with System.runAs or without sharing to bypass FLS

duplicate-aware.description: Field update may create duplicates - requires pre-check and merge workflow
duplicate-aware.notes: Use for unique fields like Email that may trigger duplicate detection

bulk-api.description: Large volume updates (>2000 records) should use Bulk API
bulk-api.notes: Better performance and governor limit handling for bulk operations

CampaignMember.ContactId.reason: ContactId field has FLS restrictions preventing direct update
CampaignMember.ContactId.sessionContext: Email validation - Emily Bedel contact merge
CampaignMember.ContactId.errorMessage: Unable to create/update fields: ContactId. Please check the security settings of this field
CampaignMember.ContactId.workaround: Query original CampaignMember, delete it, create new with updated ContactId preserving all other fields

CampaignMember.LeadId.reason: Same FLS restriction pattern as ContactId
CampaignMember.LeadId.notes: Assumed same behavior as ContactId - verify if needed

Contact.Email.reason: Email field has duplicate detection rules that block updates creating duplicates
Contact.Email.sessionContext: Email validation - duplicate detection blocking updates
Contact.Email.errorMessage: DUPLICATES_DETECTED: Use one of these records?
Contact.Email.workaround: Use duplicate-aware-update.js utility which checks for duplicates before update and triggers merge workflow if needed

Lead.Email.reason: Email field has duplicate detection rules
Lead.Email.notes: Same duplicate detection behavior as Contact.Email

Account.Name.reason: Account name may have duplicate detection rules enabled
Account.Name.notes: Check org-specific duplicate rules before bulk updates

Task.WhoId.reason: WhoId can be directly updated without FLS restrictions
Task.WhoId.sessionContext: Justin Morfin contact merge - 11 tasks successfully updated
Task.WhoId.notes: Verified working in contact merge scenarios

Opportunity.ContactId.reason: Standard relationship field without FLS restrictions

CampaignMember.reason: Most relationship fields on CampaignMember have FLS restrictions

beforeUpdate: Check if field exists in fieldMappings
If not found, check object in objectDefaults
If strategy is 'duplicate-aware', run duplicate check first
If strategy is 'delete-recreate', verify backup exists
If strategy is 'apex-required', ensure Apex class deployed

utilities: email-pattern-validator.js - Pattern discovery and correction planning
agents: sfdc-data-operations - Primary agent for bulk data operations
